---
title: Contact
comments:
  utterances:
    repo: traitecoevo/austraits.org
---

We would love to hear from you about AusTraits data, tools, collaborations, and reuse.

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid">
  <article class="contact-card">
    <span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-database-add"></i></span>
    <h3>Contribute data</h3>
    <p>Discuss new datasets, legacy sources, metadata, or expert review.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="contact-card">
    <span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-question-circle"></i></span>
    <h3>Ask a question</h3>
    <p>Get help with access, citation, data structure, or use in analysis workflows.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="contact-card">
    <span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-chat-left-text"></i></span>
    <h3>Share feedback</h3>
    <p>Tell us what is useful, confusing, missing, or worth improving.</p>
  </article>
</div>
```

Email the team at [austraits.database@gmail.com](mailto:austraits.database@gmail.com), or leave a comment below.
